Strategic planning, forecasting and growth for New Zealand businesses

Findlay & Co is a New Zealand consultancy that helps businesses plan, forecast and scale, with a particular focus on bringing new products to market.

Get in touch

About Findlay & Co

Clear thinking for the decisions that shape growth

We work alongside business owners and leadership teams on the choices that determine how a business grows: where to focus, how to forecast realistically, and how to scale operations and capability without losing momentum. We are especially well known for helping businesses develop and launch new products, and for turning strategy into the day to day systems that make it happen.

What We Do

One consultancy, four ways we help you grow

From boardroom strategy to the training that builds your people, we cover the full path from plan to capability.

Strategic Consultancy

Planning, forecasting & scaling

Clear plans, realistic forecasts, and the operating rhythm to deliver them. We help you set direction, model the numbers, and scale with confidence, with particular strength in developing and launching new products.

Start a conversation ›
Capability Solutions

Workplace training & branded LMS

Through Capability Solutions we develop workplace training for New Zealand businesses, covering health and safety, manual handling, first aid, biosecurity, and workplace behaviour and communication. We build bespoke courses for everything from specific machinery operation and procedures to site inductions, and we provide fully hosted, company branded LMS tenancies so every business can run training under its own brand.

Visit Capability Solutions › Browse courses ›
SiteKey

Site access & compliance

Through SiteKey we help businesses manage site access, inductions, and contractor and visitor management, so the right people are on site with the right training and the records to prove it. It is health and safety compliance made practical for everyday operations.

Visit SiteKey ›
Partnerships & Standards

Accreditation & industry programmes

We collaborate with other training businesses, including QCONZ for MPI Accredited Persons biosecurity training, and we develop programmes aligned to NZQA Skills Standards for Private Training Establishments and for industry peak bodies.

Biosecurity Training NZ ›

How We Deliver Training

Training built around your business, not a template

Everything we build is designed for New Zealand workplaces and delivered on platforms you control.

Bespoke courses

Custom training built for your specific machinery, procedures, site inductions and roles, in your own words and to your own standards.

Company branded LMS

Fully hosted, company branded learning tenancies so your team trains in an environment that looks and feels like yours.

Accredited pathways

Programmes aligned to NZQA Skills Standards and partner accreditation, including MPI Accredited Person training with QCONZ.

FAQ

Frequently asked questions

Findlay & Co is a New Zealand consultancy specialising in strategic planning, forecasting and helping businesses scale, with particular strength in developing and launching new products. We also deliver workplace training and company branded learning systems through Capability Solutions, and site access and compliance management through SiteKey.

Yes. We are a New Zealand based consultancy and work with business owners and leadership teams throughout the country, both on strategy and on the training and compliance their teams need.

We help you validate the opportunity, model realistic forecasts, and build the operating plan and team capability to take a new product to market, then support you through the scale up.

Capability Solutions develops workplace training and fully hosted, company branded learning management systems. SiteKey manages site access, inductions, and contractor and visitor compliance.

Yes. Through Capability Solutions we build bespoke courses covering everything from specific machinery operation and procedures to site inductions, delivered on your own company branded training site.

Email Gordon Findlay at gordon@findlayandco.co.nz with a short note about your business and what you are trying to achieve, and we will arrange a conversation.
